details.description: Create a data visualization dashboard using pandas and matplotlib
Write a simple 'Hello World' function in Python

spec_tasks.title: Analyze user request
spec_tasks.description: Analyze the user's request for a 'Hello World' function in Python and identify the requirements

spec_tasks.title: Design function structure
spec_tasks.description: Design the structure of the 'Hello World' function, including the function name, parameters (if any), and return type

spec_tasks.title: Write 'Hello World' function
spec_tasks.description: Write the 'Hello World' function in Python based on the designed structure

spec_tasks.title: Review 'Hello World' function
spec_tasks.description: Review the written 'Hello World' function to ensure it meets the user's request and follows Python coding standards

spec_tasks.title: Test 'Hello World' function
spec_tasks.description: Test the 'Hello World' function to ensure it works as expected and doesn't have any bugs

results.design_specs: As an AI, I need specific task description and additional context to generate a Mermaid diagram and an API contract. Please provide the details about the system or process that you want to visualize or the API that you need to define. For example, you can provide information about a user registration system, an e-commerce platform, a blog management system, etc.
